title: Projectors & Screens
metaTitle: Projector & Screen Rentals in Rochester, NY | HIGHLANDMEDIA
metaDescription: Rent projectors and projection screens for events in Rochester, NY. Portable to high-lumen models, front and rear screens. Delivery and setup available.
intro: From boardroom presentations to ballroom-scale projection, we carry the right projectors and screens for your event. All equipment is maintained, tested, and delivered ready to go.
items: Portable projectors (3,000–5,000 lumens) for meeting rooms and small venues
High-lumen projectors (7,000+ lumens) for ballrooms, auditoriums, and outdoor events
Front projection screens — tripod, fast-fold, and dress kit options in multiple sizes
Rear projection screens and rigs
Short-throw and ultra-short-throw projectors for tight spaces
Projector mounting and rigging hardware

title: Sound & PA Systems

items: Powered speakers — 10" to 15" tops, subwoofers
Line array systems for large venues and outdoor events
Digital mixing consoles

Audio playback devices

title: Lighting Equipment
metaTitle: Event Lighting Rentals in Rochester, NY | HIGHLANDMEDIA

LED wash fixtures — stage and area lighting
